sourceFile: 7. LEAP-1A Engine  CAT A (50 Questions) R01.pdf
question: The Leap -1A cowling assembly consists of: (CAT A, B1, B2)

options.text: Air intake cowl, fan cowl, thrust reverser cowl, exhaust system.
Drain mast.
Engine build up.

sourceFile: 7. LEAP-1A Engine  CAT A (50 Questions) R01.pdf
question: How to deactivate thrust reverser system for maintenance (Eng Leap 1-A): (CAT A, B1, B2)

options.text: Pull the lock handle at manual locking actuator.
With Lockout Pin with red warning flag
Install the quick-release pin to hold the inhibit lever in the OFF position.

sourceFile: 7. LEAP-1A Engine  CAT A (50 Questions) R01.pdf
question: How to make sure Engine Leap 1-A Fan cowl door fully locked: (CAT A, B1, B2)

options.text: Make sure 03 latch handles are fully locked and flush with the fan cowl surface and the flag on the LH Fan cowl door is fully retracted.
Make sure that all the latch handles stay in the fan cowl slots and are aligned with the adjacent fan cowl surface. And the key removed after turnback to lock position.

Use a SCREWDRIVER to push the pin towards the door locator then make sure that all the latches stay in the fan cowl slots and are aligned with the bottom of the adjacent cowl surface and the key removed.

sourceFile: 7. LEAP-1A Engine  CAT A (50 Questions) R01.pdf
question: If you see the red flag shown on the Eng Leap 1-A LH Fan cowl door, what does it mean: (CAT A, B1, B2)

options.text: Fan cowl latch keeper No.1 opened (AMM 71-13-00-00 CONF 03)
All Reverser latches opened.
All Fan cowl and Reverser latches opened.

sourceFile: 7. LEAP-1A Engine  CAT A (50 Questions) R01.pdf
question: The warning message “Eng 1(2) Fan Cowl Not CLSD” come into view when: (CAT A, B1, B2)

options.text: Engine Fan cowl door latch No.1 opened.
At least 02 Fan cowl door latches opened.
All Fan cowl door latches opened.

2 rod for Fan Cowl and 1 rod for Reverser
2 rod for Fan Cowl and 2 rod for Reverser

Inlet Gearbox (IGB) & No.1 & No.2 Bearing assembly, Transfer Gearbox (TGB) assembly and Accessory Gearbox (AGB) assembly.

sourceFile: 7. LEAP-1A Engine  CAT A (50 Questions) R01.pdf
question: Stage 2 HPT Stator Nozzle: (CAT A)

options.text: There are 36 nozzles manufactured from alloy based nickel, Each nozzle has a thermal barrier coating applied.
There are 36 nozzles manufactured from nickel based alloy. Each nozzle has a thermal barrier coating applied.
There are 36 nozzles manufactured from nickel based titan. Each nozzle has a thermal barrier coating applied.

sourceFile: 7. LEAP-1A Engine  CAT A (50 Questions) R01.pdf
question: The function of the No.3 bearing is to: (CAT A)

options.text: Support radial loads through the No.3 roller bearings and support axial, radial and circumferential loads through the No.2 ball bearings.
Support radial loads through the No.3 roller bearings and support centrifugal shaft, radial and circumferential loads through the No.3 ball bearings.
Support radial loads through the No.3 roller bearings and support axial, radial and circumferential loads through the No.3 ball bearings.

To give optimal engine operation by compressor airflow and turbine clearance control

sourceFile: 7. LEAP-1A Engine  CAT A (50 Questions) R01.pdf
question: How does the fuel temperature tranducer measure temperature? (CAT A, B1, B2)

options.text: The temperature expands the sensing material and modifies its Resistance. The signal passing through the material is thus also modified.
The temperature expands the sensing material and modifies its Voltage. The signal passing through the material is thus also modified.
The temperature expands the sensing material and modifies its Amperage. The signal passing through the material is thus also modified.

Distribute 115VAC to Ignition plugs
